invariants.name: single-auth-boundary
invariants.description: Auth decision signals present in middleware layer

invariants.name: fail-closed-default
invariants.description: No permissive default: allowed true in entitlement switches

invariants.name: no-secrets-in-logs
invariants.description: Console/logger sinks must not echo obvious secret-bearing payloads

invariants.name: env-not-tracked
invariants.description: .env files must not be tracked by git

invariants.name: no-client-server-import
invariants.description: No direct import edge from client to server (or reverse) without shared layer

invariants.name: correlation-id-middleware
invariants.description: Correlation / request id referenced in middleware

invariants.name: migrations-have-rollback
invariants.description: Migration files should declare down/rollback paths

invariants.name: no-hardcoded-secrets
invariants.description: No obvious hard-coded secret literals in server code

invariants.name: dockerfile-is-critical-surface
invariants.description: Dockerfile must be declared as a critical surface in CLAUDE.md

invariants.name: powershell-exit-code-isolation
invariants.description: All tools/*.ps1 must have explicit exit 0 on success path; $LASTEXITCODE must not be inherited from prior commands via null propagation

invariants.name: powershell-variable-interpolation-safe
invariants.description: No unbraced variable immediately followed by colon in double-quoted PS strings: '$var:' is a PSDrive reference, not a variable. Must be '${var}:'.

check.note: Match '$identifier:' not followed by second colon (to avoid false-positives on $env:VAR, $HKLM:, etc.) — manual review required for borderline cases
